name: HR_DOCUMENT_TYPES_B
description: This table will contain definitions for type of personal document that can be  maintained by Documents of Record functionality.

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key. Uniquely identifies a Document Type

columns.Name: CATEGORY_CODE
columns.Comments: Define document category for a document type.

columns.Name: SUB_CATEGORY_CODE
columns.Comments: Define document sub category for a document type.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Legislation code derived from the Legal Entity.

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_TYPE_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Document type to be applicable to person or assignment.

columns.Name: WARNING_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Warning Period (number of days in advance) to send a notification? in case a particular document is going to expire.

columns.Name: ACTIVE_INACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Activate or deactivate a document type In case it is not suitable for deletion.

columns.Name: MULTIPLE_OCCURENCES_FLAG
columns.Comments: Determine if a particular document type can have multiple instances for the same person, for example Visa.

columns.Name: AUTHORIZATION_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: Determine if an operation like create, update, delete for particular type of document needs approval or not .

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_NAME_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: This will decide if documents of this type will support attribute document name or not. This can take YES/NO value.

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_NUMBER_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: This will decide if documents of this type will support the attribute document number or not. This can take YES/NO value.

columns.Name: DATE_FROM_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: This will decide if documents of this type will support attribute DateFrom or not.

columns.Name: DATE_TO_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: This will decide if documents of this type will support attribute DateTo or not.

columns.Name: ISSUING_AUTHORITY_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: This will decide if documents of this type will support attribute Issuing Authority or not.

columns.Name: ISSUED_DATE_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: This will decide if documents of this type will have issue date as mandatory attribute or not.

columns.Name: ISSUING_COUNTRY_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: This will decide if documents of this type have issuing country as mandatory attribute or not.

columns.Name: ISSUING_LOCATION_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: This will decide if documents of this type require attribute issuing location or not.

columns.Name: COMMENTS_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: This will decide if the documents of this type will support attribute Comments or not.

columns.Name: PUBLISH_REQUIRED
columns.Comments: This will decide if documents of this type will require publishing or not.

columns.Name: SYSTEM_DOCUMENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Name of the document type.

columns.Name: HIERARCHY_CODE
columns.Comments: Can be GENERIC - For choosing Legal Employer based Hierarchy or PAYROLL - For choosing Payroll based Hiearchy

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: BI_REPORT_PATH
columns.Comments: BI Report Path

columns.Name: LOCK_CREATE
columns.Comments: Creation allowed or not

columns.Name: LOCK_UPDATE
columns.Comments: Updated allowed or not

columns.Name: LOCK_DELETE
columns.Comments: Deletion allowed or not

columns.Name: MIN_ATTACHMENTS_COUNT
columns.Comments: Minimum Attachments Required .

columns.Name: RESTRICT_CREATE_ATTACH
columns.Comments: obsoleted - not in use.

columns.Name: RESTRICT_UPDATE_ATTACH
columns.Comments: obsoleted - not in use.

columns.Name: RESTRICT_DELETE_ATTACH
columns.Comments: obsoleted - not in use.

columns.Name: ARCHIVE_CRITERIA_DAYS
columns.Comments: Archive documents of records of current document type after criteria days.

columns.Name: ARCHIVE_CRITERIA_BASIS
columns.Comments: Archive criteria bases i.e Creation Date , To Date , Issued Date etc .

columns.Name: PURGE_ARCHIVE_CRITERIA_DAYS
columns.Comments: Purge archived documents of records of current document type after criteria days.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: LOCK_CREATE_ROLE_LIST
columns.Comments: Creation allowed for these roles.

columns.Name: LOCK_UPDATE_ROLE_LIST
columns.Comments: Updation allowed for these roles.

columns.Name: LOCK_DELETE_ROLE_LIST
columns.Comments: Deletion allowed for these roles.

columns.Name: DFF_GLB_SEG_DISPLAY_PREF
columns.Comments: Global segment display preferences.

columns.Name: DFF_CTX_SEG_DISPLAY_PREF
columns.Comments: Context segment display preferences.

columns.Name: DFF_CTX_SEG_DEFAULT_VALUE
columns.Comments: Context segment default value.

columns.Name: TAG_LIST
columns.Comments: Tags used to identify document type for classification and grouping
